---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug to help improve CLIver
title: '[Bug] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description
A clear description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Run `cliver ...`
2. ...
3. See error

## Expected Behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened. Include error messages or stack traces.

## Environment
- CLIver version: (run `cliver --version`)
- Python version: (run `python --version`)
- OS: (e.g., Ubuntu 22.04, macOS 14)
- LLM provider: (e.g., Ollama, DeepSeek API)

## Additional Context
Any other context, screenshots, or logs.
